name: Static Tool-UI Dashboard
description: AI SDK tool calls mapped 1:1 to a fixed catalog of pre-built dashboard components — the model never emits markup.
whenToUse: Reach for Static GenUI when your product has a small, well-known set of visualizations or actions and brand consistency matters more than open-ended flexibility. It's the safest strategy because the component catalog itself is the safety boundary — there's no code path where model output becomes markup.
previewPrompts: Compare this month's signups to last month's.
Give me the top 5 accounts by ARR as a table.
Show a metric card for active users this week.
